steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is C, $-2.95x^2 -7.2x + 12.16$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

eliminationHtml:
• Choice A — $-2.2x^2 + 1.6$: Missing the $-7.2x$ term and wrong constant; incorrect expansion. ✗
  • Choice B — $-2.2x^2 + 11.2$: Wrong $x^2$ coefficient ($-2.2$ vs $-2.95$) and missing the $x$ term. ✗
  • Choice C — $-2.95x^2 -7.2x + 12.16$: Matches $-2.95x^2 - 7.2x + 12.16$ exactly. ✓
  • Choice D — $-2.95x^2 -7.2x + 0.64$: Correct $x^2$ and $x$ terms but wrong constant; likely forgot to add 6.4 back. ✗
That is the correct answer.
